images.caption: Figure 1:(a)Triplet-block layout for diffusion training on a strictly causal LM. Each logical blockiiunfolds left to right as three contiguous physical blocks: a masked copyb1(i)b_{1}^{(i)}, an identical lossable masked copyb2(i)b_{2}^{(i)}, and a clean ground-truth copyb3(i)b_{3}^{(i)}that refreshes the recurrent hidden state for blocki+1i+1.(b)Per-block iterative denoising at inference. At each step, the sampler commits every position whose top-11probability exceedsτ\tau. The loop terminates when every position is committed; the now-clean block is appended tocc, and the next logical block begins.
Figure 2:Inference throughput of LLaDA-8B, RWKV-7.2B, and B3D-RWKV-7.2B on an H100 80GB GPU.
Figure 3:Effect of (a) sampling steps and (b) commit thresholdτ\tauon decoding throughput and accuracy on ARC-E benchmark.
Figure 4:Latency in milliseconds by prefilled context length.
